name: CENTERSPACE
summary: PART I OVERVIEW Centerspace (we, us, our, Centerspace, or the Company) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) organized under the laws of North Dakota that is focused on the ownership, management, acquisition, development, and redevelopment of apartment communities. Our current emphasis is on making operational enhancements that will improve our residents experience, redeveloping some of our existing apartment communities to meet current market demands, and acquiring new apartment communities ...
